RULING:
A R G U E D: SAN FRANCISCO IS THE PROPER VENUE FOR THIS CASE. DEFENDANTS SCOTT SYME AND NANCY WYATT'S Motion For Change Of Venue: DENIED. DEFENDANT'S ANSWER SHOULD BE FILED AND SERVED NO LATER THAN 12/27/04. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina T. Paxton, CSR #1558
